useCases.description: Qonto uses Notion to centralize product development with a single roadmap, automated progress tracking, and customized Kanban workflows.

useCases.description: Qonto maintains a company wiki, teamspaces, and individual pages in Notion as a single source of truth for documentation and task management.

useCases.description: Qonto integrates Notion with tools like FigJam and Slack to minimize manual work and maintain company-wide alignment.

faq.question: What plans is Notion AI available on?
faq.answer: Notion AI is only available on Business and Enterprise Plans, though Free and Plus Plans get a limited number of complimentary AI responses.

faq.question: What is Notion Agent?
faq.answer: Notion Agent is a customizable AI teammate that can take on tasks from start to finish, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create or edit content like pages and databases.

faq.question: How do I use Notion AI to translate a page?
faq.answer: Go to the three-dot menu at the top of the page, select Translate, and Notion AI will translate the page into your desired language.

faq.question: What are the limits for AI image generation in Notion?
faq.answer: During beta, users have a limit of 10 image generations or edits per 24 hours and 30 per 30 days, with limits resetting on a rolling basis.

faq.question: What is Cursor?
faq.answer: Cursor is an AI-native code editor built as a fork of VS Code by Anysphere, embedding AI directly into the editor with features like inline tab completions, Composer for multi-file edits, and background agents on cloud VMs.

faq.question: Is Cursor free?
faq.answer: Yes, Cursor has a free Hobby tier with 2,000 code completions per month and 50 slow premium model requests, but most professional developers upgrade to Pro for unlimited completions and more features.

faq.question: Does Cursor work in JetBrains or Neovim?
faq.answer: No, Cursor is only available as a standalone IDE and does not have plugins for JetBrains, Neovim, Visual Studio, or Xcode.

faq.question: Does Cursor send my code to the cloud?
faq.answer: Yes, Cursor routes code through its own servers to reach the AI model, but you can enable Privacy Mode to prevent code from being stored or used for training.
